title: eragrostis heteromera
intro: Eragrostis heteromera, also known as the "Devil's Grass," is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Eragrostis heteromera include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder for use in herbal remedies.
